title: Frontend Batch 29 - Admin Inline Editor Routing and Return Path Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public inline Work editor return path behavior so unsafe protocol-relative returnTo values are rejected and sanitized save failures preserve inline editor state.
behaviorBugsFound: Work inline edit save could navigate to a protocol-relative returnTo such as //evil.example.
Work inline detail fallback navigation could retain unsafe returnTo in the resulting public detail URL.

validation.command: npx skills find nextjs inline editor routing return path testing

validation.notes: RED run failed with 1 unsafe returnTo assertion.

remainingGaps: Browser history/back-button behavior remains better suited to Playwright once Docker/backend e2e is available.
Inline Blog unsaved dialog browser integration can be revisited during e2e stabilization.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 30 - Admin Remaining Mutation Confirmation Failure Reinforcement.
